thread.title: Election Results 2024: Mahayuti’s Landslide Victory in Maharashtra, INDIA Bloc Retains Jharkhand
thread.title_full: Election Results 2024: Mahayuti’s Landslide Victory in Maharashtra, INDIA Bloc Retains Jharkhand

author: GittyAiden
title: Election Results 2024: Mahayuti’s Landslide Victory in Maharashtra, INDIA Bloc Retains Jharkhand
text:
Oh, strap in, folks! We’ve got ourselves a political rollercoaster that’s shifted gears quicker than an Indian politician dodges a tough question. I suppose it’s only fitting that in a democracy as vibrant as India’s, the election results are flashier than a Bollywood blockbuster!
Maharashtra: A BJP-Led Bollywood Musical
Let’s start with Maharashtra, where the BJP-led Mahayuti dance crew has just snagged a whopping 235 out of 288 assembly seats! That’s a "Bollywood blockbuster" level of success right there, and you’ve got to admire their commitment to what we can only assume was a choreographed victory celebration with jalebis and ladoos! I can only imagine the celebrations—Devendra Fadnavis is probably twirling around with a plate of sweets, declaring, “Chal, mujhse dosti karoge?” (Come, will you be friends with me?)
Prime Minister Narendra Modi chimed in with a fitting catchphrase: “Ek hain to safe hain”—or in plain English, “Together, we’re safe.” This is the kind of monologue that puts the dramatic leads of any soap opera to shame. It’s one slogan after another, and you just know he’s gearing up for a spin-off set in a new state!
Jharkhand: Roll Call of the INDIA Bloc
Meanwhile, in Jharkhand, the JMM-led INDIA bloc didn’t just stick around; they stormed back into action, winning 56 of 81 seats! That’s like a sequel that outshines the original, proving once again that sometimes the underdog rises, doesn’t he? Hemant Soren’s winning statement thanking the people was as heartfelt as a mother calling her child at 2 AM for a “quick check” after a night out.
And by the way, can we talk about Priyanka Gandhi’s Wayanad win? She claimed victory by a margin as wide as a politician’s promise. Four lakh votes more than her brother Rahul’s last triumph? They say sibling rivalry can be brutal, but maybe this win is a gentle nudge on Rahul. Perhaps she could start a new “Gandhi-Gandhi” service of political advice!
The Drama Behind the Scenes
Yet beneath the glitzy surface, there’s always some behind-the-scenes drama worth noting. The Shiv Sena (Uddhav Balasaheb Thackeray faction) didn’t just lose; they turned around and yelled “WHAT?!” I mean, it’s like forgetting the lyrics to your own song at a live concert. Uddhav is throwing around accusations left, right, and center. The Congress party is left scratching their heads like someone just revealed a surprise exam that they forgot to study for!
On the flip side, with all the celebrations happening, I do wonder if any of our dear politicians got together for a pun-filled game of “Count your losses.” The Congress called the results comprehensively unexpected—their new go-to excuse. The only thing surprising here is how they managed to keep up the suspense for this long!
A Good Solid ‘Maha’ Mandate
In conclusion, whether you’re dancing on the sidelines or trying to make sense of deeply political drama, the takeaway from this election season is clear: the people have spoken. Maharashtra has bolstered the BJP-led Mahayuti’s ethos—wait a minute, is that the sound of a new slogan? “Maharashtra: Where the Jalebi is Sweeter, and the Politics is Hotter!”
And as we wrap up this symphony of electoral results, one thing is for sure: The curtain has lifted, but stay tuned; the encore is just beginning! Don’t be surprised if tomorrow we see memes erupting that poke fun at all this while delivering wisdom wrapped in a dose of laughter. You know what they say, "Politics is the art of looking for trouble, finding it everywhere, diagnosing it incorrectly, and applying the wrong remedies!" Cheers! 🍭
<!– –> Elections Results 2024 Highlights: The Mahayuti returned to power in Maharashtra on Saturday.
Maharashtra, Jharkhand Election Results 2024 Highlights : In a significant electoral shift, the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP)-led Mahayuti alliance has achieved a remarkable victory in Maharashtra, alongside the Jharkhand Mukti Morcha (JMM)-led INDIA bloc reclaiming power in Jharkhand. The results of the assembly elections for the two states were officially declared on Saturday, marking a pivotal moment in regional politics.
In Maharashtra , the ruling Mahayuti coalition, which comprises the BJP, Shiv Sena, and Nationalist Congress Party, secured a resounding victory by winning 235 out of 288 assembly seats. The BJP’s individual success saw it clinch 132 seats, reinforcing its dominant position in the state. Political speculation is rife regarding Deputy Chief Minister Devendra Fadnavis taking up the Chief Minister’s role for the third consecutive time. In an evening address, Prime Minister Narendra Modi remarked that the overwhelming message from Maharashtra, following the Haryana polls, signifies unity, declaring that the mantra “ek hain to safe hain” encapsulates the nation’s intent.
In Jharkhand , the JMM alongside its partners successfully captured 56 out of the total 81 assembly seats. Chief Minister Hemant Soren expressed heartfelt gratitude to the electorate, stating: “I extend my thanks to the citizens from all walks of life—including farmers, women, and the youth—for casting their votes and contributing to the success of these elections with the majority…”
Highlights of the Assembly Election Results 2024:
Eknath Shinde’s Shiv Sena Defeats Uddhav Thackeray’s Faction In 36 Seats
The Shiv Sena led by Chief Minister Eknath Shinde knocked out rival Shiv Sena (Uddhav Balasaheb Thackeray) of Uddhav Thackeray in 36 constituencies in Maharashtra polls, putting to rest the debate over which is the real party founded by the late Bal Thackeray. Shinde’s Sena, a constituent of the ruling Mahayuti alliance, won 57 of the 81 seats it contested. Hemant Soren Urges People To Take Resolve To Build ‘Golden Jharkhand’
Jharkhand Chief Minister Hemant Soren greeted the people of state following the party-led alliance’s victory in the assembly polls and said they will together work for achieving “Golden Jharkhand”. “Greetings to all people of Jharkhand, let us walk together and take resolve for building Golden Jharkhand,” he said in a post on X. समस्त झारखण्डवासियों को जोहार,
आइए, साथ चलकर हम सोना झारखण्ड के निर्माण का संकल्प लें।
जय संविधान!
जय लोकतंत्र!
जय झारखण्ड! pic.twitter.com/0uwet4t90f
– Hemant Soren (@HemantSorenJMM) November 23, 2024
Maharashtra Congress Chief Nana Patole Scrapes Through In Sakoli
Maharashtra Congress President Nana Patole survived a scare from his nearest BJP rival in the Sakoli assembly constituency but managed to win the tight contest by a narrow margin of 208 votes. MNS, Ambedkar’s VBA Fail To Make Impact In Maharashtra
The Maharashtra Navnirman Sena (MNS) of Raj Thackeray and Prakash Ambedkar’s Vanchit Bahujan Aghadi (VBA) failed to make an impact in the state assembly polls. Devendra Fadnavis Meets Nitin Gadkari At His Residence
Maharashtra Deputy Chief Minister Devendra Fadnavis and state BJP chief Chandrashekhar Bawankule met Union minister Nitin Gadkari at the latter’s residence in Nagpur on Saturday night after the Mahayuti scored a stupendous victory in the elections. Fadnavis and other leaders were welcomed by Gadkari and his wife. Schemes Like Ladki Bahin Yojana Played Key Role In Mahayuti’s Victory: Ajit Pawar
Thanking voters, Maharashtra Deputy Chief Minister Ajit Pawar said schemes like the Ladki Bahin Yojana have played a major role in the Mahayuti’s victory in the Maharashtra Assembly polls. BJP Emerges Largest Party In Thane-Palghar With 12 Wins
The BJP managed to make substantial inroads into Thane and Palghar by winning 12 seats in the two districts in the Maharashtra assembly polls. BJP-Led Mahayuti Registers Landslide Victory In Maharashtra
The BJP-led Mahayuti alliance secured a landslide victory in Maharashtra after it won 235 of the 288 seats in the assembly elections. People’s Love Turned Into Votes: Shaina NC On Mahayuti’s Win
Shiv Sena leader Shaina NC on Saturday termed Mahayuti’s victory in the Maharashtra assembly elections as “historic”, adding that the people of the state voted for a ‘Viksit Bharat’. AIMIM Retains Malegaon Central Seat By Razor-Thin Margin
The AIMIM has managed to retain the Malegaon Central seat in north Maharashtra by a razor-thin margin of 162 votes. INDIA Bloc Has Passed Exam Of Democracy In Jharkhand, Says Hemant Soren
Chief Minister Hemant Soren on Saturday expressed gratitude to people of Jharkhand for INDIA bloc’s stellar performance in the assembly polls, asserting that it passed the exam of democracy. Former Maharashtra Chief Minister Ashok Chavan’s Daughter Wins Debut Poll
Sreejaya Chavan, daughter of former Maharashtra chief minister Ashok Chavan, won her debut assembly poll contest from Bhokar seat in Nanded district by trouncing Congress rival Tirupati Kadam Kondhekar by 50,551 votes. Election Results 2024: “Best for Maharashtra,” says Amruta Fadnavis on Mahayuti’s win in Maharashtra
Amruta Fadnavis, Maharashtra Deputy Chief Minister Devendra Fadnavis’ wife, said that Mahayuti winning the assembly election is “the best” for the state. Punjab Bypolls: AAP Wrests 3 Seats, Congress Wins One, BJP Draws Blank
In a boost to Punjab’s ruling Aam Aadmi Party, the party wrested the Gidderbaha, Dera Baba Nanak, and Chabbewal Assembly segments while the Congress won the Barnala seat in the bypolls, the results of which were declared on Saturday. Election Results 2024 LIVE: Priyanka Wins Wayanad Bypoll
Congress leader Priyanka Gandhi Vadra won the Lok Sabha bypoll from Wayanad in Kerala by a record margin of 4,10,931 votes. PM Modi Congratulates JMM-Led Alliance For Jharkhand Performance
Prime Minister Narendra Modi also thanked the people of Jharkhand for supporting the National Democratic Alliance (NDA). PM Narendra Modi Thanks People Of Maharashtra For ‘Historic Mandate’
As the BJP-led Mahayuti appeared set to sweep the Maharashtra elections, Prime Minister Narendra Modi thanked the people of the state for the “historic mandate”. Maharashtra Election Results 2024: Zeeshan Siddique trails from Vandre East constituency
Amit Thackeray, MNS leader Raj Thackeray’s son, is trailing in the Mahim assembly constituency in Maharashtra. Election results 2024: Aditya Thackeray ahead of Milind Deora by 400 votes in Worli blockbuster
Aditya Thackeray, son of Shiv Sena (Uddhav Balasaheb Thackeray) chief Uddhav Thackeray, in a narrow lead over Milind Deora, the candidate from the Eknath Shinde faction. Eknath Shinde Celebrates with ‘ladoos’ as Mahayuti is closer to win
Maharashtra Chief Minister and Shiv Sena leader Eknath Shinde celebrated with ‘ladoos’ as Mahayuti is inching closer to form the government in the state. Maharashtra Election Results 2024 Live Updates: Status of top 5 parties in Maharashtra The BJP is leading on majority of the seats in Maharashtra at 124, following by the Shiv Sena (Eknath Shinde) at 56 seats. The Shiv Sena (Uddhav Thackeray) is leading on 19 seats.
-‍ What key initiatives did ​Deputy ‌Chief Minister Ajit Pawar attribute​ to the BJP-led Mahayuti ⁤alliance’s victory in the recent Maharashtra Assembly elections? ‌ The recent Maharashtra Assembly elections‌ have resulted ⁣in a significant victory for the BJP-led Mahayuti alliance, which won 235 out​ of 288 seats. ⁤The Deputy Chief Minister, ‌Ajit⁢ Pawar, attributed this⁤ success ⁣to several initiatives, particularly highlighting the⁣ Ladki Bahin Yojana, which​ he ‍believes resonated⁢ well with voters.
In ‌addition to Mahayuti’s overall success, the BJP made ⁣notable ‍gains in the Thane and Palghar districts, winning ​12 seats. This in-depth performance across⁤ diverse​ regions underscored the alliance’s ability to connect ‍with the electorate.
Shiv Sena‍ leader Shaina​ NC characterized the victory as historic,⁤ emphasizing that it‍ reflects the people’s demand ‍for a ‘Viksit Bharat’‌ (developed India). Meanwhile, ⁤Amruta ‍Fadnavis,⁢ the wife of⁢ Deputy Chief Minister‍ Devendra Fadnavis, echoed positive sentiments about the win,‍ asserting it was advantageous for Maharashtra.
Other highlights from the ‌elections include the AIMIM retaining the Malegaon Central seat by a ⁤narrow margin and a notable debut win for Sreejaya Chavan, daughter of former Chief Minister Ashok Chavan.
Prime Minister Modi expressed gratitude to ⁢the people of Maharashtra for their support,‍ calling it a “historic mandate.” The elections also‍ saw parallel ​developments in Punjab and Jharkhand, with the AAP winning several ‌seats ⁣in Punjab’s bypolls ​and the INDIA bloc performing strongly in Jharkhand.
the Maharashtra​ elections signal⁣ a robust reaffirmation ‍of the⁢ ruling coalition’s support, alongside noteworthy individual electoral victories that reflect⁣ the evolving political⁤ landscape in the state.
